name: libsrt1.5-gnutls
title: libsrt1.5-gnutls
summary: Secure Reliable Transport UDP streaming library (GnuTLS flavour)
description:
Secure Reliable Transport UDP streaming library (GnuTLS flavour)
SRT is a latency-aware UDP transport mechanism optimized for video streams.
It detects and compensates for jitter and bandwidth fluctuations due to
network congestion. It mitigates packet loss and supports AES encryption.
.
SSL support is provided by GnuTLS.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libsrt1.5-gnutls because Secure Reliable Transport UDP streaming library (GnuTLS flavour).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libsrt1.5-gnutls as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libsrt1.5-gnutls with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libsrt1.5-gnutls --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
